_comment: Title display rules. Each key is a lowercase song title (or fragment). Rules are checked case-insensitively. 'segments' splits the title into styled spans. 'modes' = 'dark'|'light'|'both'. Use 'css_class' for CSS-animated effects defined in index.html.

_guide_colours._info: CSS variable quick-reference for segment styles:

_guide_display_flex._info: DISPLAY FLEX — the two coloured words are CSS bars (think programming syntax highlighting).
_guide_display_flex.Display; colour: style: 'color:red'  →  light mode. For dark mode try 'color:#ff5555' (brighter).
_guide_display_flex.Flex; colour: style: 'color:blue' →  light mode. For dark mode try 'color:#4488ff' (brighter).

_guide_nv_d_a_rays._info: NV|D|A RAYS — each pipe '|' is a neon-lit tube (Dan Flavin homage). Change pipe colour by swapping all three hex values in the style string.

display flex._comment: Display; in red, Flex; in blue. See _guide_display_flex above to change colours.

lit(e) rail._comment: Handled inline in JS — subtle off-white gauze on the 'e'. No segments needed here.

nv|d|a rays._comment: The pipes are neon-lit vertical tubes (Dan Flavin CSS homage). See _guide_nv_d_a_rays to change pipe colour.

she→plex._comment: Arrow animates between → and ← every second.

ɋ.bits._comment: The ɋ is replaced by one of 4 Q-variants chosen randomly at load time.

ascii mart._comment: 50% chance: title replaced with random ASCII art characters.

star casino._comment: Handled inline in JS — St⭐r Casino. Listed here for documentation only.

star chamber._comment: Handled inline in JS — St⭐r Ch⭐mber. Listed here for documentation only.
